_comment: Copied per-repo by setup-scanning. In-session scan->self-correct layer. PostToolUse scans each edited file by language (exit 2 feeds findings back to Claude for in-session fixing). Stop runs the shared scan-and-fix as a final gate, guarded by stop_hook_active. Uses pwsh (PowerShell 7, cross-platform). On a host without pwsh, swap the commands for the .sh variants (bash .claude/hooks/posttooluse-scan.sh).
